narrative:
York Township (precinct in Athens County) has 1,096 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.4 percentage points.
